info.description: Local development collection. Base URL: http://localhost:8080

Fetch role details by id.
Full update for role.
Partial update for role.
Delete a custom role created in this collection. System roles and roles assigned to users return 409 Conflict.
List users with optional filters and pagination.
Create a user with USER role. Run List Roles first to populate {{user_role_id}}.
Get user details by id.
Full update user. This example promotes the user to USER + ADMIN.
Partial update user. This example leaves only USER role.

item.name: Get Label Print Job By ID

request.description: Get a label print job with snapshot items for reprint.
Generate and return label print job PDF using Jasper template.
Upload an image file to MinIO and store id in {{image_id}}.
Get metadata for a previously uploaded image.
Download or view uploaded image content.
Lookup company data by CNPJ using the external CNPJA provider.
Lookup address data by ZIP code using the external CNPJA provider.
Returns today's sales totals, counts, top products, payment summary and recent sales.
Returns the open cash register session for the logged-in user.
Opens a new cash register session for the logged-in user.
Closes the open cash register session. Returns closing summary with difference.
Creates a cash movement. type: SUPPLY (suprimento) or WITHDRAWAL (sangria).
Creates a withdrawal movement.
Finds a product by SKU or barcode. Used in the PDV screen to add items.
Registers a sale on the current open cash register. paymentMethod: CASH, PIX, DEBIT_CARD, CREDIT_CARD, OTHER.
Returns the last N sales for the current open cash register.
Paginated sales history. ADMIN can filter by userId; cashier sees only own sales. Optional: paymentMethod, sortBy (createdAt, totalAmount, paymentMethod), sortDirection.
Returns aggregated sales totals for the given date: total amount, count, average ticket, hourly breakdown, top products and payment method summary.
Returns a closing summary per cash register session for the given date: opening amounts, movements, sales, closing amounts and differences.
Lists all cash register sessions (open and closed) for the selected period. Defaults to today when params are omitted.
Full summary of a cash register session: movements, payment methods and recent sales.
